pipeline_metadata.query_template:
Identify clauses related to:
- Service Level Agreements (SLAs)
- Delivery timelines and schedules
- Project milestones
- Performance metrics and KPIs
- Uptime guarantees
- Response time requirements
- Deliverables and outputs
- Operational requirements
- Service availability
- Maintenance windows

extracted_clauses: System availability shall be measured monthly and exclude scheduled maintenance windows.
All deliverables must meet the timeline specified in the project schedule.
Delays in deliverable submission may result in project timeline adjustments and potential penalties.
evidence: System availability shall be measured monthly and exclude scheduled maintenance windows.
All deliverables must meet the timeline specified in the project schedule.
Delays in deliverable submission may result in project timeline adjustments and potential penalties.

raw_context:
System availability shall be measured monthly and exclude scheduled maintenance windows.

MILESTONES AND TIMELINE

All deliverables must meet the timeline specified in the project schedule.

Delays in deliverable submission may result in project timeline adjustments and potential penalties.

SERVICE LEVEL AGREEMENT
